title_cn: 伦敦IPO复兴面临挫折，希望者考虑推迟
summary: Several UK companies including Waterstones Booksellers Ltd. and SumUp Payments Ltd. are considering deferring their initial public offerings in London to 2027, according to people familiar with the matter, denting the capital’s hopes for a substantial revival in listings activity this year.

title: European Stocks Steady as Energy Offsets Travel, Tech Losses
title_cn: 由于能源抵消了旅行和科技股的损失，欧洲股市保持稳定
summary: European stocks were muted as declines in tech and travel shares were offset by gains in the energy sector, which was lifted by higher oil prices.

title: Trump Says US Will Be Reimbursed 20% Rate for Hormuz Traffic
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将获得霍尔木兹海峡交通20%的补偿
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would reinstate its blockade of Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demanded a 20% reimbursement on all other cargo shipped through the waterway.

title: UBS Sees Goldman, JPMorgan in Focus on Busy Earnings Day
title_cn: 瑞银认为高盛和摩根大通将在繁忙的财报日聚焦
summary: UBS Group AG analyst Erika Najarian says Goldman Sachs Group Inc. may have the tallest order when it comes to demonstrating earnings prowess this week, while investors may be focused on more on succession at JPMorgan Chase & Co. She previews Wall Street bank earnings on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Rallies as Trump Says US Will Be Paid 20% for Hormuz Flows
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将因霍尔木兹海峡流量支付 20%，油价上涨
summary: Oil jumped after US President Donald Trump said he would reimpose a blockade on Iranian ships transiting the Strait of Hormuz and demand a payment for all other cargo moving through the waterway, dashing hopes for a near-term recovery in shipping flows.

title: Top Risks Facing Bank Earnings
title_cn: 银行盈利面临的主要风险
summary: Big bank earnings kick off with expectations running sky-high. KBW's Chris McGratty joins Open Interest to explain why capital markets remain a major tailwind, why deposit costs and credit quality could become the biggest risks, and why Morgan Stanley stands out as his top large-bank pick despite rich valuations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apollo’s Slok Warns of Dollar’s Vulnerability to an AI Pullback
title_cn: Apollo 的 Slok 警告美元容易受到人工智能回调的影响
summary: The dollar’s recent gains are at risk if the selloff in artificial intelligence stocks deepens, according to Apollo Global Management Inc.’s Torsten Slok.

title: American Aid Worker With Ebola ‘Stable’ in German Hospital
title_cn: 感染埃博拉病毒的美国援助人员在德国医院“病情稳定”
summary: An American aid worker who tested positive for Ebola is stable and being treated in a specialized isolation unit at Frankfurt University Hospital in Germany, according to a statement from the hospital.

title: Wall Street Banks Set to Pull in Almost $39 Billion From Trading
title_cn: 华尔街银行将从交易中吸纳近 390 亿美元
summary:
The biggest US banks — set to kick off a marathon Tuesday with five of those firms reporting second-quarter earnings — are reaping the benefits of a volatile past few months that’s spurred more action from clients wanting to trade.
Chris McGratty, Head of US Bank Research at KBW, previews what to expect from bank earnings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Fall as Hormuz Standoff Spurs Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 霍尔木兹僵局刺激石油反弹，股市下跌：市场总结
summary: A standoff between the US and Iran lifted oil prices, dragging down stocks and bonds after clashes over the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about a disruption in energy supplies that could fuel inflation.

title: Gold Tumbles as US-Iran Strikes Heighten Fed Rate Hike Bets
title_cn: 美伊冲突加剧美联储加息押注 金价暴跌
summary: Gold dropped the most in more than two weeks as renewed US-Iran hostilities in the Middle East sent oil prices higher, fueling expectations that the Federal Reserve may have to raise interest rates to contain inflation.

title: US to Raise Mexico Sugar Imports to 1.15 Million Metric Tons
title_cn: 美国拟将墨西哥食糖进口量增加至 115 万吨
summary: The US Department of Agriculture estimates it will import as much as 1.15 million metric tons of Mexican sugar in the 2026-2027 period, according to a statement posted on X by Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum.

title: Tech Stocks Slide as Oil Climbs on Hormuz Standoff
title_cn: 霍尔木兹对峙导致石油价格上涨，科技股下跌
summary:
A selloff in tech giants sent stocks lower, with the market also falling as oil jumped after clashes over the Strait of Hormuz raised concerns about a disruption in energy supplies that could fuel inflation.
Stuart Kaiser, Head: US Equity Trading Strategy at Citi gives his outlook on the markets and looks ahead to June CPI out Tuesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Rallies as Conflict Over Hormuz Escalates With Fresh Strikes
title_cn: 霍尔木兹冲突升级，新一轮罢工导致石油价格上涨
summary:
Oil gained after the US carried out another wave of strikes against Iran, with the two sides disputing whether the Strait of Hormuz was open.
Ed Morse, Senior Advisor and Commodity Strategist at Hartree Partners, discusses what's next for energy markets amid uncertainty in the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Copper Rises as Traders Weigh Demand After US-Iran Strikes
title_cn: 铜价上涨，交易商在美伊袭击后权衡需求
summary: Copper edged higher as traders weighed the outlook for demand after renewed hostilities between the US and Iran fueled concerns about global economic growth.

title: MGM Rises on Takeover Bid; SK Hynix Falls on Memory Pullback | Stock Movers
title_cn: 米高梅收购要约上涨； SK海力士因内存回调而下跌|库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers:

- MGM Resorts International (MGM) shares are rising on a report regarding a potential takeover bid from Barry Diller.
- SK Hynix (SKHY) shares are lower and other memory stocks are also falling. It is lower over concerns with the sustainability of artificial-intelligence spending. The drop in South Korean trading is likely to cause a hit to the American depositary receipts as well. The debate between the optimists and pessimists will continue, which should create volatility, according to Hendi Susanto, portfolio manager at Gabelli Funds.
- Agenus (AGEN) shares are moving higher on news of a deal that it's selling up to $3540 million worth of securities. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasury Two-Year Yields Rise to Highest Since 2025 as Oil Jumps
title_cn: 随着油价上涨，两年期国债收益率升至 2025 年以来最高
summary: Short-maturity US Treasury yields climbed to their highest levels since early 2025 as renewed tensions with Iran pushed up oil prices, fanning speculation that the Federal Reserve will need to raise interest rates to combat inflation.

title: Millennium Taps JPMorgan Veteran to Lead New Push Into Brazil
title_cn: Millennium 聘请摩根大通资深人士领导进军巴西的新举措
summary: Billionaire Izzy Englander’s Millennium Management is expanding into Latin America’s biggest economy.

title: Trump Says US Would 'Keep the Strait' And Run It
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将“保留并管理海峡”
summary: The US and Iran have escalated attacks against each other as President Donald Trump says the US will "keep the Strait" and "probably run it." Both countries have been offering conflicting statements about whether the Strait of Hormuz is actually open to shipping. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India Pushes State Banks to Step Up Foreign Currency Deposits
title_cn: 印度敦促国有银行增加外币存款
summary: India has asked state-owned banks to intensify efforts to garner foreign currency deposits from the 35-million-strong diaspora, as the country seeks to boost its external buffers and shore up the flagging rupee.

title: US Stocks Fall as Mideast Tensions Flare Anew, Oil Climbs
title_cn: 中东紧张局势再度加剧，油价上涨，美国股市下跌
summary: US stocks dropped on Monday as investors assessed tit-for-tat attacks between the US and Iran and conflicting information over the status of the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Delta CEO Says Oil Prices Will Stay 'Sticky for Longer'
title_cn: 达美航空首席执行官表示油价将“长期保持粘性”
summary: Delta Air Lines CEO Ed Bastian says oil prices will stay "sticky for longer," but the carrier will still do "just fine." He says there is still strong demand for premium and international travel. He speaks to Bloomberg's Lisa Abramowicz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SK Hynix ADRs Tumble in Second Trading Day After Korea Selloff
title_cn: 韩国抛售后，SK 海力士 ADR 在第二个交易日暴跌
summary: An AI-fueled stock rout in South Korea spilled over into the US market Monday, as SK Hynix Inc. American depositary shares fell as much as 9.3%, underscoring growing investor concerns that the boom is overextended.

title: South Africa Plans First Strategic Oil Boost Since Apartheid
title_cn: 南非计划自种族隔离以来首次战略石油增产
summary: South Africa plans to increase its strategic oil reserves for the first time since the apartheid government stockpiled crude, adding to measures across the continent to mitigate supply shocks.

title: We Tried Out Dyson's New Portable Fan
title_cn: 我们尝试了戴森的新款便携式风扇
summary:
The newest status symbol on the streets of Manhattan is a high-tech portable fan that’s been hard to get hold of. Samantha Kelly tried one of Dyson's new portable fans out in the New York City heat. 

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s $650 Billion Rally Fueled by Traders Fleeing AI Selloff
title_cn: 交易员逃离人工智能抛售推动苹果股价上涨 6500 亿美元
summary: Investors are flocking back to Apple Inc. as nervousness about artificial intelligence spending weighs on the stocks of chipmakers and cloud-computing giants.

title: Renewed Iran Woes Flip Script for Traders Betting War Risks Over
title_cn: 伊朗危机重燃，交易员押注战争风险翻转脚本
summary: A day after making an investment call tied to subsiding Middle East tensions, BCA Research’s Marko Papic had to scrap his recommendation at a loss. Donald Trump had said the war in Iran was back on.

title: Delta Will Do Just Fine With High Fuel Prices, CEO Says
title_cn: 首席执行官表示达美航空将在高燃油价格下表现良好
summary: Delta Air Lines Chief Executive Officer Ed Bastian says higher fuel prices are not deterring travel. He says the carrier is actually seeing strong demand for premium, corporate and international travel. He also talks about how some customers are choosing a better seat on the plane over perks they could get in first class. He speaks to Bloomberg's Lisa Abramowicz at Delta headquarters in Hapeville, Georgia on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Cocoa’s Uneven Demand Recovery Runs Into Fresh Price Volatility
title_cn: 可可需求复苏不均衡引发新的价格波动
summary: Cocoa demand is expected to remain uneven across the world, suggesting the recovery remains fragile as renewed supply concerns push bean prices higher and threaten to keep chocolate pricier for longer.

title: US and Iran Trade Strikes, Dispute Whether Hormuz Is Open
title_cn: 美国和伊朗贸易打击，霍尔木兹海峡是否开放存在争议
summary: The US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes overnight into Monday, prolonging a spate of tit-for-tat attacks at a time when the two nations offer conflicting statements over whether the Strait of Hormuz is open to shipping.

title: FCC Cutting Satellite Approval Lag In Half, Chairman Says
title_cn: 主席表示，FCC 将卫星审批滞后时间缩短了一半
summary: The Federal Communications Commission has reduced by half the backlog of satellite application approvals as it broadly seeks to stimulate the space and communications economy, Chairman Brendan Carr said in an interview on Bloomberg TV.

title: Lazard's Bilicic Sees 'Tremendous' Demand for AI Data Center Power
title_cn: Lazard 的 Bilicic 看到人工智能数据中心电力的“巨大”需求
summary: George Bilicic, Lazard's global head of power, energy and infrastructure, says we're a long way from solving the issue of energy demand for AI data center power and expects upward pressure on gas prices. He speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sunrun Offers Solar Users Hundreds Per Month in Compute Program
title_cn: Sunrun 为太阳能用户提供每月数百美元的计算计划
summary: Sunrun Inc. is piloting a program aimed at enabling customers to earn hundreds of dollars per month that would use electricity from rooftop solar installations to power distributed computing, according to Chief Executive Officer Mary Powell.

title: Sunrun's Experiment to Turn Homes Into AI Hubs
title_cn: Sunrun 将家庭变成人工智能中心的实验
summary: Sunrun CEO Mary Powell joins Open Interest to explain how the company plans to transform homes with solar and batteries into AI computing hubs. She says homeowners could earn hundreds of dollars a month by hosting AI compute nodes while helping meet soaring demand for AI infrastructure. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: General Fusion Soars After Nasdaq Debut
title_cn: General Fusion 纳斯达克上市后股价飙升
summary: General Fusion CEO Greg Twinney joins Open Interest after the company's Nasdaq debut, explaining why going public accelerates its fusion roadmap, how fusion could power AI data centers, and why he believes the company's mechanical approach can outperform rival technologies in the global race for commercial fusion energy. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Gas-Power Costs at 17-Year High and Climbing, Lazard Says
title_cn: Lazard 称美国天然气发电成本创 17 年来新高且仍在攀升
summary: The cost of power from natural gas-fired plants in the US hit the highest level in at least 17 years, and is poised to climb even higher as demand surges from new data centers.

title: AI Chip Giants TSMC and SK Hynix Pull in Different Directions
title_cn: AI芯片巨头台积电和SK海力士分道扬镳
summary:
TSMC soared while SK Hynix tumbled — why are are the two essential AI chip firms pulling in different directions?

Tom Mackenzie explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Intel Invests €5 Billion to Expand Irish Hub in AI Chip Race
title_cn: 英特尔投资 50 亿欧元扩建爱尔兰人工智能芯片竞赛中心
summary: Intel Corp. is spending €5 billion ($5.7 billion) to expand its plant in Ireland, as the chipmaker attempts to regain its manufacturing dominance for the AI boom.

title: SK Hynix Selloff Is Not a Huge Problem, Kunst Says
title_cn: Kunst表示，SK海力士抛售并不是一个大问题
summary: Sarah Kunst, founder and general of Cleo Capital, says the selloff in SK Hynix shares and South Korean stocks is not a problem. Kunst points out that SK Hynix has gained more than 500% over the past year. She speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Lawsuit Threatens to Disrupt OpenAI’s Bid to Rival the iPhone
title_cn: 苹果的诉讼可能会扰乱 OpenAI 与 iPhone 竞争的努力
summary: Apple Inc.’s lawsuit accusing OpenAI of systematically stealing its intellectual property threatens to disrupt the AI company’s device ambitions long before the case is resolved.

title: ChatGPT’s Upgraded Voice Mode Captures the Imperfections of Real Conversations
title_cn: ChatGPT 升级语音模式捕捉真实对话的不完美之处
summary: The OpenAI chatbot now speaks and converses a lot more like a real person

title: Washington Is Looking to Keep China From Training Its AI on US Models
title_cn: 华盛顿希望阻止中国在美国模型上训练人工智能
summary: Anthropic and OpenAI’s warnings about “adversarial distillation” are reinvigorating one of the oldest debates in Silicon Valley.

title: Researchers Raise Concerns That AI May Atrophy Human Skills
title_cn: 研究人员担心人工智能可能会削弱人类技能
summary: Will we end up with a generation of experts in high-stakes professions who never build true expertise?

title: Germany’s Smag Sinks in Debut as Defense Stock Appetite Ebbs
title_cn: 由于国防股需求下降，德国 Smag 首次亮相就下跌
summary: Smag Mobile Antenna Masts AG shares tumbled as much as 33% below the initial public offering price in their German trading debut, marking the latest sign of waning demand for defense stocks in Europe.

title: Who’s Scamming the Scammers?
title_cn: 谁在欺骗骗子？
summary: Scambaiting is one way the fed-up masses are dealing with a flood of fraud.

title: Dyson’s New $100 Portable Fan Is Beating the Heat — and Sales Expectations
title_cn: 戴森 100 美元的新款便携式风扇正在消暑——和销售预期
summary: The newest status symbol on the streets of Manhattan is a high-tech portable fan that’s been hard to get hold of.

title: Meta’s Louisiana Data Center to Surpass $250 Billion Price Tag
title_cn: Meta 路易斯安那州数据中心的造价将超过 2500 亿美元
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. has committed to spending an additional $40 billion on its sprawling data center campus in Louisiana, pushing its total expected investment beyond $250 billion for the site as it continues to grow its artificial intelligence computing footprint.

title: EU to Present Plan to Restrict Children’s Access to Social Media
title_cn: 欧盟将提出限制儿童使用社交媒体的计划
summary: The European Union will propose a law to restrict children’s access to social media, according to the bloc’s top official, as part of a growing global consensus about the harm it causes.

title: Raxio to Enter Tanzania With $380 Million Funding Push
title_cn: Raxio 斥资 3.8 亿美元进军坦桑尼亚
summary: Africa-focused data-center firm Raxio Group plans to enter Tanzania as it increases its funding pool to $380 million, Chief Executive Officer Robert Skjødt said.

title: TSMC’s Sales Soar 36% in Latest Sign of AI Spending Momentum
title_cn: 人工智能支出势头最新迹象，台积电销售额飙升 36%
summary: Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co. reported a 36% jump in quarterly sales, meeting elevated expectations while signaling global demand for AI computing remains intact.

title: Xi to Debut at China’s Flagship AI Summit as US Rivalry Heats Up
title_cn: 习近平将在中国人工智能旗舰峰会上首次亮相，美国竞争加剧
summary: Chinese President Xi Jinping will make his first appearance at the country’s flagship AI conference, signaling the growing importance Beijing attaches to the technology as its rivalry with the US intensifies.

title: Saudi Arabia Becomes Top Buyer in Taiwan’s Young Drone Industry
title_cn: 沙特阿拉伯成为台湾年轻无人机产业的最大买家
summary: Saudi Arabia bought a record $47.2 million of drones from Taiwan last month — a sign the island’s nascent UAV industry is becoming more attractive to buyers.

title: Why AI Might Actually Create More Work for Lawyers
title_cn: 为什么人工智能实际上可能为律师创造更多工作
summary: It seems obvious that among the many industries that AI might disrupt, the legal profession might face some of the most adverse outcomes. When clerical, research-based tasks like searching through databases and reading contracts are automated, what is left for lawyers to do and how might they justify all those billable hours? In this episode we speak with Gary Wingens, chair and partner at the law firm Lowenstein Sandler. He talks about how his firm is using AI and why he thinks the technology could end up increasing legal work for lawyers as costs come down, creating a sort of “Jevon's paradox” for lawsuits, deals and litigation. We also talk about the billable hours model and training junior talent. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Morgan Stanley’s Wilson Sees Profit Boost for Stocks Beyond Tech
title_cn: 摩根士丹利的威尔逊认为科技股以外的股票利润将得到提振
summary: US stocks beyond the technology giants are poised to report strong earnings this season, broadening the equity rally, according to Morgan Stanley strategists.

title: South Korea to Tap Record AI Tax Windfall to Fund Future Growth
title_cn: 韩国将利用创纪录的人工智能税收暴利为未来增长提供资金
summary: South Korea expects to reap a record tax windfall from the artificial intelligence-driven semiconductor boom, giving President Lee Jae Myung’s government fresh fiscal firepower to fund an ambitious investment agenda.

title: SK Hynix Shares Slump in South Korea After US Listing
title_cn: SK海力士在美国上市后韩国股价暴跌
summary: SK Hynix shares declined in Seoul on Monday after the memory chipmaker’s highly-anticipated US trading debut. The company’s $26.5 billion US offering was closely watched as a test of demand for overseas offerings as well as for the longevity of the artificial intelligence rally. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: MiniMax Shares Slump After JPMorgan Cuts Target Price Further
title_cn: 摩根大通进一步下调目标价后 MiniMax 股价暴跌
summary: MiniMax Group Inc.’s shares plunged, after JPMorgan Chase & Co. slashed the Chinese AI model maker’s price target for the second time in less than a week on value dilution concerns caused by fresh fundraising.

title: How Once-Struggling SK Hynix Became a Trillion-Dollar Company
title_cn: 曾经陷入困境的 SK 海力士如何成为价值万亿美元的公司
summary: SK Hynix Inc. is hardly a household name. But the maker of memory chips, which two decades ago was struggling to survive, is now South Korea’s second-most valuable listed company, just behind Samsung Electronics Co.

title: アップルのMacチップ戦略転換、自動運転車の「失敗」がAI基盤築く－Power On
title_cn: 苹果Mac芯片战略转变，自动驾驶汽车“失败”为AI奠定基础 - Power On
summary: 中止した自動運転車開発の技術遺産。現在のAI競争力を支える意外な理由とは。

title: UK Counter-Terror Police Lead Probe Into Murder of Ann Widdecombe
title_cn: 英国反恐警察牵头调查安·维德科姆谋杀案
summary: UK counter-terrorism police said they have taken over the investigation into the murder of Reform politician Ann Widdecombe after new evidence emerged about her death last week.

title: Trump Recommends Graham’s Sister Serve Out His Senate Term
title_cn: 特朗普建议格雷厄姆的妹妹完成参议员任期
summary: President Donald Trump said the late Senator Lindsey Graham’s sister, Darline Graham Nordone, should serve out his term for the South Carolina seat.

title: US Expands Cuba Sanctions With Targeting of Tourism Industry
title_cn: 美国扩大对古巴制裁，针对旅游业
summary: The US added Cuba’s Ministry of Tourism to its expanding sanctions list, striking once-again at one of the main economic drivers of the communist-run Caribbean island.

title: European Powers Join Forces to Build Anti-Ballistic Systems
title_cn: 欧洲强国联手建立反弹道系统
summary: A coalition of European nations agreed to share research and industrial experience to build an anti-ballistic missile defense, moving away from its reliance on the US as Ukraine struggles against Russia’s onslaught.

title: ICE Involved in Fatal Maine Shooting, State Lawmaker Says
title_cn: 州议员称 ICE 参与了缅因州致命枪击事件
summary: A person was killed in a shooting involving US Immigration and Customs Enforcement in Maine on Monday morning, the speaker of the state’s House of Representatives said in a social media post.

title: Zurich Ranks Top in Disposable Income Poll Despite $7 Coffees
title_cn: 尽管咖啡价格为 7 美元，苏黎世在可支配收入调查中仍名列前茅
summary: Zurich and Geneva may be the most expensive places in the world to buy your meat and veg but it’ll still pay off as the two Swiss cities top a new survey of the highest disposable incomes in the world.

title: Regulators Unveil Guidance Targeting Bank Services to Immigrants
title_cn: 监管机构公布针对移民的银行服务指南
summary: Top US bank agencies unveiled guidance Monday that calls on lenders to manage the way they engage immigrant clients who may present “elevated” risks.

title: Crimea Loses Fuel, Water and Power, But Not Russian Tourists
title_cn: 克里米亚失去了燃料、水和电力，但俄罗斯游客却没有
summary: Russian tourists are continuing to take their summer holidays in Crimea despite persistent Ukrainian drone attacks, a state of emergency, fuel shortages and power outages on the annexed Black Sea peninsula.

title: Putin Puts Akzo Nobel’s Local Assets Under Temporary Control
title_cn: 普京将阿克苏诺贝尔的当地资产置于临时控制之下
summary: Russian President Vladimir Putin ordered stakes in three Russian companies owned by Dutch paints and coatings maker Akzo Nobel NV transferred to temporary administration.

title: Pentagon Spending on Mexican Border Operations Tops $2.6 Billion
title_cn: 五角大楼在墨西哥边境行动上的支出突破 26 亿美元
summary: The Pentagon has spent at least $2.64 billion on operations at the southwest border with Mexico, according to Congress’s audit agency in the most comprehensive cost accounting yet of the military’s expanded role in immigration enforcement.

title: Switzerland and UK Agree Trade Deal to Deepen Post-Brexit Ties
title_cn: 瑞士和英国达成贸易协议以深化脱欧后关系
summary: Switzerland and the UK concluded talks on an updated free-trade agreement, bringing Western Europe’s two major non-European Union economies closer together with a pact focused on services.

title: Merz Urges Currency Dialogue with China as Trade Worries Rise
title_cn: 随着贸易担忧加剧，默茨敦促与中国进行货币对话
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz reinforced a call for dialogue with China to address concerns that the world’s second-largest economy is shoring up an unfair trade advantage by keeping its currency artificially low.

title: Brazil Draft Rule Opens Uranium Mining to Private Partners
title_cn: 巴西规则草案向私人合作伙伴开放铀矿开采
summary: Brazil plans to open its uranium mining sector to private investment by allowing partnerships with companies, provided the state-owned nuclear company retains at least a 20% stake in each venture, according to a draft regulation seen by Bloomberg.

title: EU to Sanction Sudan’s Gold Trade as Civil War Rages
title_cn: 内战愈演愈烈，欧盟将制裁苏丹黄金贸易
summary: The European Union approved new trade prohibitions on Sudan’s gold sector as the country’s civil war enters its fourth year.

title: DOJ Is Probing Claims UAW’s President Abused Union Position
title_cn: 司法部正在调查 UAW 主席滥用工会职位的指控
summary: The US Justice Department launched a grand jury investigation into allegations that the head of the United Auto Workers pressured another high-ranking union official to secure benefits for his fiancée and her sister, according to internal communications within the labor organization.

title: How the Sudden Death of Sen. Graham Will Shift the GOP
title_cn: 参议员格雷厄姆的突然去世将如何改变共和党
summary: Jon Lieber of the Eurasia Group reflects on how the sudden death of Senator Lindsey Graham of South Carolina will impact President Donald Trump and foreign policy in the Republican party. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." Graham died on Saturday at age 71. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: California Lawmakers Push Fix for Hollywood Tax Credits
title_cn: 加州立法者推动修复好莱坞税收抵免
summary: A California business tax credit cap aimed at saving $4 billion threatens to drive away film and television production, according to a letter signed by a bipartisan group of lawmakers who demanded a quick fix to the budget signed by Governor Gavin Newsom.

title: Hungary Is Poised to Oust President in Rollback of Orban Era
title_cn: 匈牙利准备罢黜总统，重返欧尔班时代
summary: Hungarian lawmakers are set to oust the Viktor Orban-allied president as Prime Minister Peter Magyar seeks a clean break from his nationalist predecessor.

title: Macron Calls on EU to Deliver More Joint Defense Projects
title_cn: 马克龙呼吁欧盟实施更多联合防御项目
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron urged European Union allies to pursue more joint defense projects as he sought to turn the page on a failed partnership with Germany to build a new fighter jet.

title: Morgan Stanley’s $2.5 Billion Parking-Meter Sale Roils Chicago Council
title_cn: 摩根士丹利 25 亿美元出售停车计时器引发芝加哥议会骚乱
summary: For almost two decades, Chicago has been stewing over a $1.15 billion deal to lease 36,000 parking meters to an investor group led by Morgan Stanley. Now, with the meters set to change hands, the city council is seizing on an opening to push back.

title: Graham’s Death Leaves Void for Trump, Global Allies
title_cn: 格雷厄姆的去世给特朗普和全球盟友留下了空白
summary: On Ukraine, Iran and more, Graham held Trump’s ear like few others.

title: UK Civil Servant Challenges Firing Over Mandelson Appointment
title_cn: 英国公务员挑战解雇曼德尔森任命
summary: The former head of the UK Foreign Office, who was fired by Keir Starmer in the row over Peter Mandelson’s links to Jeffrey Epstein, has submitted a legal challenge against the government.

title: Uproar Over High Doctors Wages Hits Polish Ruling Party Support
title_cn: 医生高薪引起的轩然大波打击了波兰执政党的支持
summary: Prime Minister Donald Tusk’s ruling party is losing ground in polls a year before elections, following uproar over how much doctors’ salaries are eating up from the strained healthcare budget.

title: Ukraine Says It Hit More Oil and Dry-Cargo Ships in Sea of Azov
title_cn: 乌克兰称在亚速海击中更多油船和干货船
summary: Ukrainian forces hit seven Russian fuel tankers, five dry-cargo vessels and a batch of other ships in the Sea of Azov as Kyiv expands the scope of its maritime attacks in the area.

title: Europe Looks for a Musk-Free Path to Space
title_cn: 欧洲寻找一条无麝香的太空之路
summary: Europe is competing with US, China and Russia to establish a sovereign space industry.

title: Long Night of Jakarta Raids Found Gold Bars, Wads of Cash
title_cn: 雅加达长夜突袭发现金条和大量现金
summary: Diners at de’Clan Signature, an eatery in the low-rise South Jakarta neighborhood of Cipete, knew something was up when heavily armed police converged upon the restaurant last Wednesday afternoon.

title: As Milei’s Aura Fades, Argentina Starts to Look for a Third Way
title_cn: 米莱光环褪去，阿根廷开始寻找第三条路
summary: Corruption was once Javier Milei’s strongest card against the Peronist movement that dominated Argentine politics for decades. Now it’s just one of several vulnerabilities that are damaging the libertarian president’s brand and giving wings to the opposition’s comeback plans.
